title: SimplyDithered
description: A simple yet very customizable shader featuring adjustable dithering, CRT effects, and customizable colors.
body:
## About

A simple yet very customizable shader featuring adjustable dithering, CRT effects, and customizable colors.

## Features

* Customizable pixel shape and gap
* Customizable resolution and sampling
* Choose between Bayer (Ordered) and White Noise for dithering
* Customizable dither strength
* Color limiting and effects
* Retro effects like CRT Scanlines and Vignette
* Ignore certain aspects of the game to control what gets pixelated
* Built-in profiles

## Technical

Requires Iris 1.7.0+.

Performance can range heavily from Low Impact to High Impact. If your game is lagging, try turning down the Average Quality, turning up the Pixel Density, or changing the Sampling Mode to "Single Pixel", all of which are in Resolution and Sampling.
